description: This video explains the concepts of bull and bear markets, highlighting the characteristics of bullish and bearish trends in asset prices.
topic_summary: The video discusses the definitions of bull and bear markets, explaining that a bull market is characterized by a series of rising prices [t=29:23], while a bear market features declining prices [t=38:35]. It also notes that both market types can experience temporary reversals [t=47:79].
aliases: What Are Bull and Bear Markets
